zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH价格1572附近运行，整体处于SMA20下方，短期趋势偏弱震荡，市场动能不足，多空博弈加剧，尚未形成明确方向突破

MACD指标为负值-5.31，显示空头动能占优但未显著扩张，短线反弹力度有限。RSI缺失但结合价格结构判断中性偏弱，需观察修复

下方支撑关注1564附近日内低点，进一步支撑在1550区域；上方阻力集中在1591均线及1600整数关口，突破需放量确认

操作上建议区间思路为主，未突破前低多高空谨慎参与；若有效站上1591可轻仓试多，跌破1564则顺势做空并严格止损控制风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading around 1572.39 USD, reflecting a modest 24-hour gain of 0.32% while remaining locked in a narrow consolidation range. Price action continues to oscillate between 1564.83 and 1578.11, signaling short-term indecision. Despite intraday stability, the broader structure remains slightly bearish as ETH trades below its 20-day SMA near 1591.99, indicating that overhead supply is still limiting upward momentum.

Momentum signals suggest subdued and uneven pressure rather than a strong directional trend. The MACD reading at -5.31620 reflects lingering bearish momentum, although the absence of a clear signal line reading reduces confidence in any crossover interpretation. With RSI (14) unavailable, momentum strength cannot be fully quantified. However, sustained trading below the 20-day SMA continues to imply that buyers have not yet regained control.

Key technical levels define the current battlefield between buyers and sellers. Immediate support is located at the session low of 1564.83, with a psychological buffer near 1550 if downside pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is seen at 1578.11, followed by the 20-day SMA around 1591.99, which serves as a dynamic resistance zone. A decisive move above 1600 would be required to reestablish bullish structure.

From a trading perspective, ETH favors range-bound strategies while confined between 1565 and 1578, with opportunities for short-term mean reversion setups. A breakout above 1592 could signal a shift in momentum and open targets toward 1600–1620. Conversely, a breakdown below 1560 would increase bearish risk, potentially exposing lower liquidity zones near 1550, warranting tighter risk management or reduced exposure.
